shield.example: She shielded her eyes from the sun.

shiver.example: She shivered in the cold wind.
A shiver ran down his back.
shiver.example_zh: 一陣寒顫掠過他的背脊。

shortage.example: There was a water shortage in summer.
shortage.example_zh: 夏天出現了缺水的情況。

shove.example: Don't shove others in the line.
He gave the door a hard shove.

shrug.example: He shrugged and said he didn't know.

shuttle.example: A shuttle bus runs to the airport.
shuttle.example_zh: 有一班接駁巴士開往機場。

shuttle.example: A van shuttles guests to the beach.
shuttle.example_zh: 一輛廂型車接送客人往返海灘。

siege.example: The castle was under siege for weeks.
siege.example_zh: 這座城堡被圍困了好幾週。

skeleton.example: We saw a dinosaur skeleton at the museum.
skeleton.example_zh: 我們在博物館看到了恐龍骨架。

skull.example_zh: 安全帽能保護你的頭骨。

slam.example: She slammed the door in anger.
The car slammed into the wall.

slap.example: He slapped the table to make a point.
slap.example_zh: 他拍了一下桌子來強調。

slap.example: She gave him a slap on the back.

slavery.example_zh: 他們為終結奴隸制度而奮鬥。

slot.example: Put the coin in the slot.

smash.example: He won the point with a powerful smash.
smash.example_zh: 他用一記強力扣殺贏得這一分。

smog.example_zh: 濃厚的霧霾籠罩著城市。

sneak.example: He tried to sneak out of the house.

sniff.example: The dog sniffed at the box.

soak.example: Soak the beans overnight before cooking.
soak.example_zh: 煮之前先把豆子泡一個晚上。

soar.example: The eagle soared high in the sky.

sob.example: The child sobbed after the fall.
sob.example_zh: 那孩子跌倒後啜泣起來。

sober.example: He stayed sober at the party.
sober.example_zh: 他在派對上一直保持清醒。

sole.example: She was the sole survivor of the crash.
sole.example_zh: 她是那場空難唯一的生還者。

sole.example: The sole of my shoe is worn out.

solo.example_zh: 她唱了一首美妙的獨唱。

solo.example: He made a solo flight across the sea.

sophisticated.example: The phone has a sophisticated design.

sophomore.example: He is a sophomore in high school.

souvenir.example: I bought a souvenir from the trip.
souvenir.example_zh: 我在旅途中買了一個紀念品。

sovereignty.example_zh: 這個國家捍衛自己的主權。

sow.example: Farmers sow seeds in the spring.

spacious.example: Their new house is bright and spacious.
spacious.example_zh: 他們的新房子明亮又寬敞。

sparkle.example: The diamonds sparkled in the light.
sparkle.example_zh: 鑽石在燈光下閃閃發亮。

sparkle.example: There was a sparkle in her eyes.

specialist.example_zh: 她去看了心臟科專科醫生。

specialize.example: This shop specializes in old books.

specialty.example_zh: 海鮮是這位主廚的拿手菜。

specify.example: Please specify the time and place.
specify.example_zh: 請明確指出時間和地點。

specimen.example: The scientist studied a leaf specimen.
specimen.example_zh: 科學家研究了一份葉片標本。

spectrum.example: A rainbow shows the spectrum of colors.
spectrum.example_zh: 彩虹呈現出色彩的光譜。

sphere.example: A basketball is shaped like a sphere.
She is famous in the sphere of art.

spine.example: Good posture keeps your spine healthy.
spine.example_zh: 良好的姿勢能保持脊椎健康。

sponge.example: She wiped the table with a sponge.

sponsor.example: A local company sponsored the team.
sponsor.example_zh: 一家當地公司贊助了這支球隊。
這場比賽有好幾個贊助商。

sponsorship.example: The event received sponsorship from a bank.
sponsorship.example_zh: 這場活動獲得一家銀行的贊助。

spouse.example: You may bring your spouse to the party.
spouse.example_zh: 你可以帶配偶來參加派對。

squash.example: They play squash at the gym.

squat.example: He squatted down to pet the cat.

stability.example: The country enjoys peace and stability.
stability.example_zh: 這個國家享有和平與穩定。

stack.example: She put a stack of books on the desk.

stack.example_zh: 他把盤子整齊地疊起來。

stain.example: There is a coffee stain on his shirt.
stain.example_zh: 他的襯衫上有個咖啡漬。

stall.example: We bought fruit at a market stall.
stall.example_zh: 我們在市場攤位買了水果。

stall.example: The car stalled at the lights.
stall.example_zh: 車子在紅綠燈前熄火了。

stance.example: She took a firm stance on the issue.
stance.example_zh: 她在這個議題上立場堅定。

startle.example: The sudden noise startled the cat.
startle.example_zh: 突如其來的聲音嚇了貓一跳。

statistical.example_zh: 這份報告包含統計數據。

steer.example: She steered the boat toward the shore.
